title: Report says UK PM Starmer ready to quit, but source says he is still focused on the job
summary: The Observer reported that UK PM Starmer is considering quitting, discussing it with his wife at Chequers; however, conflicting sources claim he remains focused on his role. This reflects ongoing political scrutiny of his leadership.
content: The Observer report said Starmer was discussing the matter with his wife at his Chequers country residence before making a final decision.

zh.title: 报告称英国首相斯塔默准备辞职，但消息来源称他仍致力于工作
zh.summary: 《观察家报》报道称英国首相斯塔默正考虑辞职，并在切克斯与妻子讨论此事；然而，相互矛盾的消息来源声称他仍然专注于自己的职位。这反映了对他领导能力的持续政治审查。

title: Massive fire destroys resort in Dominican Republic and forces evacuation of almost 1,700 tourists
summary: A massive fire destroyed a resort in the Dominican Republic, resulting in the evacuation of approximately 1,700 tourists and one confirmed death. The incident highlights tourism infrastructure vulnerabilities in the region.
content: The fire forced the evacuation of nearly 1,700 tourists and caused the death of an Italian national, authorities said.

zh.title: 大火摧毁多米尼加共和国度假村，迫使近1,700名游客疏散
zh.summary: 大火摧毁了多米尼加共和国的一家度假村，导致约1,700名游客疏散，并造成一人死亡。这一事件凸显了该地区旅游基础设施的脆弱性。

title: ‘Money can make you happy’: My wife and I have no heirs, but we’re making the world a better place by giving it away
summary: A couple without heirs are using their wealth to support charitable causes and improve their community. Their approach demonstrates how financial resources can create meaningful impact beyond traditional inheritance models.
content: “If you find a need in your community, there’s likely an organization that will help you get involved.”

zh.title: "金钱可以让你快乐"：我和妻子没有继承人，但我们通过捐赠来改善世界
zh.summary: 一对没有继承人的夫妇正在利用他们的财富支持慈善事业并改善他们的社区。他们的方法证明了金融资源如何能在传统继承模式之外创造有意义的影响。

title: Scared to spend your retirement money? Here’s one way to get over the fear of running out.
summary: Many retirees struggle with psychological anxiety about depleting their retirement savings, a fear that can lead to costly regrets if left unaddressed. The article explores strategies to help people overcome this spending anxiety and manage their retirement finances more effectively.
content: This fear is probably going to cause you some regrets.

zh.title: 不敢动用退休金？这是克服恐惧的一种方法
zh.summary: 许多退休人员为耗尽退休储蓄而感到心理焦虑，如果不加以解决，这种恐惧可能导致代价高昂的遗憾。该文章探讨了帮助人们克服支出焦虑并更有效地管理退休财务的策略。

title: You’re going to pay tax on RMDs — there’s no way around it. Or is there?
summary: Required Minimum Distributions (RMDs) from retirement accounts typically incur taxes, but new strategies may help minimize tax liability on these mandatory withdrawals. Financial planning around RMDs is important for retirees managing cash flow.
content: Here’s your new playbook to protect your retirement cash.

zh.title: 你必须为RMDs缴税——无法规避。或者有办法吗?
zh.summary: 退休账户中的所需最低分配(RMDs)通常需要缴税,但新策略可能有助于最小化这些强制性提款的税收责任。对于管理现金流的退休人员来说,围绕RMDs的财务规划很重要。

title: Social Security is looking at a $500-a-month cut. Could a new bipartisan commission make a difference?
summary: Social Security faces potential $500-monthly cuts as the program's finances deteriorate, prompting lawmakers to propose a bipartisan commission to stabilize both Social Security and Medicare. This initiative seeks to address long-term solvency challenges.
content: A new legislative proposal would create a bipartisan commission to strengthen the finances of Social Security and Medicare at a time when the programs are under pressure.

zh.title: 社会保障面临每月500美元削减。新的两党委员会能改变局面吗?
zh.summary: 随着社会保障基金财务状况恶化,面临潜在的每月500美元削减,这促使议员们提议建立两党委员会来稳定社会保障和医疗保险。这项举措旨在解决长期偿付能力问题。

title: Inside the push to weaken Washington’s toughest financial watchdog
summary: The SEC's enforcement power is diminishing as its own commissioners work to weaken its leverage over corporate wrongdoers. This reflects a significant shift in the agency's ability to intimidate and punish financial violations. The change raises concerns about corporate accountability and enforcement of financial regulations.
content: The SEC used to intimidate corporate wrongdoers. Now its own commissioners are gutting its leverage.

zh.title: 削弱华盛顿最严格金融监管机构的推动
zh.summary: SEC的执法权力正在减弱，因为其自身的委员会成员正在削弱其对企业违法者的约束力。这反映了该机构吓阻和惩罚金融违规的能力的重大转变。这一变化引发了人们对企业问责和金融法规执行的担忧。

title: We read the Social Security and Medicare trustees reports. If you’re not worried, you should be.
summary: Trust fund auditors warn that Social Security and Medicare face serious challenges according to their latest trustee reports. The findings highlight concerns beyond typical DOGE savings rhetoric, including implications for tax policy and immigration. Experts suggest readers should be aware of these sustainability issues.
content: The truth about “DOGE” savings, no tax on Social Security, immigration — and more.

zh.title: 我们阅读了社会保障和医疗保险受信责任报告，如果你不担心，你应该担心
zh.summary: 根据最新的受信责任报告，信托基金审计员警告社会保障和医疗保险面临严重挑战。这些发现突出了超越典型DOGE储蓄言辞的关切，包括对税收政策和移民的影响。专家建议读者应该意识到这些可持续性问题。

title: Want to splurge on travel in retirement? Here’s how to plan for it.
summary: Many people delay major travel plans until retirement, but advance planning is crucial for enjoying these experiences. The article provides guidance on budgeting and timing travel expenses in retirement. Waiting too long after retirement begins can limit opportunities to enjoy trips.
content: A lot of people wait until retirement to take big trips. Plan ahead, and don’t wait too long.

zh.title: 想在退休后挥霍式旅游？以下是规划方法
zh.summary: 许多人将主要旅行计划延迟到退休，但提前规划对享受这些经历至关重要。该文章提供了关于退休期间旅行费用预算和时间安排的指导。在退休后等待太长时间可能会限制享受旅行的机会。

title: I’m 73 and living 100% off dividends from my stocks. How can I create even more income?
summary: A 73-year-old investor shares a strategy of generating income entirely from stock dividends and seeks ways to increase returns further. The piece explores portfolio construction approaches for maximizing dividend income. The concept of a bulletproof portfolio is examined as a goal for retirees with substantial assets.
content: A “bulletproof” portfolio may be impossible, but you can try to get close if you have enough money invested

zh.title: 我73岁，完全靠股票红利生活。我该如何创造更多收入?
zh.summary: 一位73岁的投资者分享了完全通过股票红利生成收入的策略，并寻求进一步增加回报的方法。该文章探讨了投资组合构建方法，用于最大化红利收入。防弹投资组合的概念被作为拥有大量资产的退休人士的目标进行了检视。

title: The one-page pledge that forces your financial adviser to put you first
summary: A simple one-page pledge exists that requires financial advisers to place client interests first, yet most investors are unaware of it or ignore it. The lack of knowledge about this rule is contributing to widespread financial fraud. Understanding and enforcing this legal requirement is critical for investor protection.
content: Most investors ignore this abstract legal rule — and it’s fueling a massive wave of fraud.

zh.title: 迫使你的财务顾问把你放在首位的一页纸承诺
zh.summary: 存在一份简单的一页纸承诺，要求财务顾问将客户利益放在首位，但大多数投资者对此一无所知或忽视它。对这项规则的缺乏了解导致了广泛的财务欺诈。理解和执行这项法律要求对投资者保护至关重要。

title: Three powerful forces are draining family wealth — and your estate plan is completely unprepared
summary: Family wealth faces threats from multiple directions including Medicaid policy changes and IRA tax complications. Most estate plans do not adequately address these emerging challenges. The article outlines specific threats to inheritance and strategies to protect family assets.
content: From Medicaid cuts to an IRA tax trap, here are the real threats to your family’s inheritance and what to do about them.

zh.title: 三股强大的力量正在耗尽家庭财富——你的遗产计划完全没有准备好
zh.summary: 家庭财富面临来自多个方向的威胁，包括医疗补助政策变化和个人退休账户税收复杂性。大多数遗产计划没有充分解决这些新出现的挑战。该文章概述了对继承的具体威胁和保护家庭资产的策略。

title: Trump tries to blame Reflecting Pool woes on vandalism, without offering substantiation
summary: The Reflecting Pool in Washington has experienced significant paint deterioration following a renovation ordered by President Trump. The administration attributes the issues to vandalism but has not provided evidence supporting this claim. The situation raises questions about the renovation's execution and maintenance.
content: The paint is peeling from Washington's Reflecting Pool after the renovation ordered by President Donald Trump.

zh.title: 特朗普试图将反思池问题归咎于破坏，但未提供证据
zh.summary: 华盛顿的反思池在特朗普总统下令的翻新后经历了严重的油漆劣化。政府将这些问题归咎于破坏，但未提供支持这一说法的证据。该情况引发了对翻新执行和维护的质疑。

title: 'Fun dads' get 5 things right about parenting that many people forget—'they're worth borrowing' this Father's Day, says expert
summary: Parenting experts identify five positive habits associated with fun dads that can enhance joy and parent-child relationships. These approaches are often overlooked by parents focused on schedules and responsibilities. The habits are presented as valuable practices worth adopting this Father's Day.
content: Many parents spend their days managing schedules, chores and responsibilities. This Father's Day, a parenting expert shares five "fun dad" habits that can increase joy and strengthen parent-child relationships.

zh.title: "有趣爸爸"在父亲节的育儿方面做对的5件事，专家说"值得学习"
zh.summary: 育儿专家确定了与"有趣爸爸"相关的五个积极习惯，可以增强快乐和亲子关系。这些方法经常被关注日程安排和责任的父母忽视。这些习惯在父亲节被提出作为值得采纳的有价值的实践。

title: Iran reportedly closes Strait of Hormuz again, casting shadow over nuclear talks
summary: Iran's military command reportedly closed the Strait of Hormuz in response to ongoing Israeli military operations in Lebanon. The closure creates uncertainty regarding ongoing nuclear negotiations. The move represents a significant geopolitical development affecting regional stability and global energy markets.
content: Iran's joint military command said the closure was in response to continued Israeli military operations in Lebanon.

zh.title: 伊朗据报再次关闭霍尔木兹海峡，给核谈判蒙上阴影
zh.summary: 伊朗军事指挥部据报关闭了霍尔木兹海峡，以回应以色列在黎巴嫩的持续军事行动。这一关闭对正在进行的核谈判造成了不确定性。这一举措代表了一项影响地区稳定和全球能源市场的重大地缘政治发展。

title: Warren Buffett’s mentor said his wealth came down to luck. Is your life savings riding on a coin flip?
summary: Warren Buffett's mentor attributed his investment success largely to luck rather than skill or knowledge. This perspective challenges the premise that financial advisers provide valuable expertise for investment decisions. The analysis suggests many investors may be paying for advisory services that rely on chance rather than expertise.
content: The illusion of investing knowledge is powerful: Why you’re probably paying a financial adviser for pure chance.

zh.title: 巴菲特的导师说他的财富源于运气。你的人生储蓄是靠掷硬币决定的吗?
zh.summary: 巴菲特的导师将其投资成功主要归因于运气而非技能或知识。这一观点挑战了财务顾问提供有价值专业知识的前提。分析表明许多投资者可能为依赖运气而非专业知识的顾问服务付费。

title: Fed Chair Kevin Warsh wants to get inflation under control. That could be bad news for home buyers seeking lower mortgage rates.
summary: The new Federal Reserve chair Kevin Warsh is focused on controlling inflation, which may limit the prospect of lower mortgage rates for homebuyers. The Fed's approach reflects a new era of policy priorities. Homebuyers continue to face significant affordability challenges despite potential policy shifts.
content: The Federal Reserve is in a “new era,” but home buyers are facing the same old affordability challenges.

zh.title: 美联储主席凯文·沃什希望控制通胀。这对寻求降低抵押贷款利率的购房者来说可能是坏消息。
zh.summary: 新任美联储主席凯文·沃什专注于控制通胀,这可能限制购房者获得较低抵押贷款利率的前景。美联储的方法反映了政策优先事项的新时代。尽管政策可能发生变化,购房者仍继续面临重大可负担性挑战。

title: ‘I’m a realist’: I’m 50 with $6.5 million saved. Should I quit my $200,000 job and retire early?
summary: A 50-year-old with $6.5 million in savings is considering early retirement to pursue full-time trading activities rather than continuing their $200,000 annual job. The decision involves weighing financial security against personal aspirations. The article explores considerations for making such a major life transition.
content: “I have been considering leaving my job so that I can focus on my trading activities full time.”

zh.title: "我是个现实主义者":我50岁存了650万美元。我应该辞去年薪20万的工作提前退休吗?
zh.summary: 一位存有650万美元的50岁人士正在考虑提前退休,以追求全职交易活动,而不是继续年薪20万的工作。这个决定涉及在财务安全和个人愿望之间进行权衡。文章探讨了做出这样重大人生转变的注意事项。

title: How to work in retirement without seeing your Social Security checks slashed
summary: Claiming Social Security benefits before full retirement age while still working can trigger unexpected benefit withholdings. Understanding these rules is important for workers planning their retirement income strategy. The withheld amounts are not permanently lost and may be recovered later.
content: Claiming benefits before full retirement age while keeping a job can trigger unexpected withholdings — but the money isn’t lost forever.

zh.title: 如何在退休后工作而不被社会保障金削减
zh.summary: 在达到完全退休年龄之前申请社会保障福利同时继续工作，可能会触发意外的福利扣减。理解这些规则对于计划退休收入策略的工作者很重要。被扣减的金额并非永久丧失，日后可能会收回。

title: The budget airline model in the U.S. is running out of runway
summary: Spirit Airlines' bankruptcy demonstrates that the budget airline model alone is insufficient for long-term success in the U.S. market. Major carriers like United and Delta continue to thrive, suggesting other factors beyond ticket pricing drive airline viability. The failure indicates fundamental challenges to the low-cost carrier strategy.
content: Spirit's bankruptcy as United and Delta fly high suggests there's more to success in airline industry than low fares, and failure isn't about jet fuel spikes.

zh.title: 美国低成本航空模式正在失去生存空间
zh.summary: Spirit航空公司的破产表明，仅靠低成本航空模式不足以在美国市场长期成功。United和Delta等主要航空公司继续蓬勃发展，表明除票价外的其他因素也驱动航空公司的生存能力。这一失败表明低成本航空战略面临根本性挑战。

title: Bitcoin's future as revolutionary as the smartphone, according to CoinDesk
summary: According to CoinDesk's president of indices and data, Bitcoin's revolutionary potential rivals that of the smartphone. The analyst encourages investors not to dismiss Bitcoin's long-term prospects. The assessment reflects a bullish outlook on cryptocurrency's transformative future impact.
content: CoinDesk’s president of indices and data has a message for investors: Don’t count out bitcoin.

zh.title: 据CoinDesk称，比特币的未来与智能手机一样革命性
zh.summary: 根据CoinDesk指数和数据主管的说法，比特币的革命性潜力可与智能手机相媲美。分析师鼓励投资者不要忽视比特币的长期前景。这一评估反映了对加密货币未来变革性影响的乐观看法。

title: SNAP restrictions could change what shoppers buy — and food giants are watching
summary: SNAP food restrictions are expanding to more states and pressuring major food and beverage companies as consumers reduce spending on less healthy items like soda, candy, and processed foods. This shift reflects growing policy efforts to influence dietary choices through benefit restrictions.
content: SNAP food restrictions are spreading to more states, pressuring major food and beverage as consumers shift spending away from soda, candy and processed foods.

zh.title: SNAP限制可能改变购物者的购买行为——食品巨头正在关注
zh.summary: SNAP食品限制正在扩展到更多州，并向主要食品和饮料公司施压，因为消费者减少了对汽水、糖果和加工食品等不健康食品的支出。这一转变反映了通过福利限制来影响饮食选择的不断增长的政策努力。

title: AI buildout gives tech investors new reasons to watch bond market
summary: Major technology companies are depleting cash reserves and taking on significant debt to fund massive AI infrastructure buildouts, making bond market movements increasingly important for tech investors. Rising interest rates could impact the profitability of these capital-intensive projects.
content: Tech giants are depleting cash reserves and raising debt in their ambitious data center buildouts, a dynamic that's forcing investors to watch interest rates.

zh.title: AI基础设施建设为科技投资者带来关注债券市场的新理由
zh.summary: 主要科技公司正在耗尽现金储备并承担大量债务来资助大规模的人工智能基础设施建设,使债券市场波动对科技投资者变得越来越重要。利率上升可能会影响这些资本密集型项目的盈利能力。

title: Google shake-up highlights how human brains may be the scarcest AI resource of all
summary: Despite growth in AI research talent, the experience required to build and scale AI systems remains in short supply, as highlighted by Google's recent restructuring. This talent scarcity is becoming a critical bottleneck in AI development across the industry.
content: Despite a growing pool of research talent, not many have the experience of building and scaling AI, experts say.

zh.title: 谷歌重组凸显人才可能是最稀缺的人工智能资源
zh.summary: 尽管人工智能研究人才在增长，但构建和扩展人工智能系统所需的经验仍然短缺，这在谷歌最近的重组中得到了强调。这种人才短缺正在成为整个行业人工智能开发的关键瓶颈。

title: Kennedy Center says it isn't required to reschedule shows after judge blocks 2-year closure
summary: A court decision has blocked the Kennedy Center's planned two-year closure for renovations, and the institution's lawyers assert they can maintain operations while proceeding with improvements after July 5. The legal ruling may allow the venue to remain partially operational during renovations.
content: Kennedy Center lawyers said the institution plans to "maintain an operational model" after July 5, when it initially was scheduled to shutter for renovations.

zh.title: 肯尼迪中心表示在法官阻止两年关闭后无需重新安排演出
zh.summary: 法院决定已阻止肯尼迪中心计划的两年翻新关闭，该机构的律师声称他们可以在7月5日之后进行改进的同时保持运营。这一法律裁决可能允许该场地在翻新期间保持部分运营。

title: Israeli strikes kill 10 in Lebanon hours after ceasefire
summary: Israeli military strikes killed at least 10 people across Lebanon's Nabatieh region overnight and into Saturday morning, occurring shortly after a ceasefire was announced. The attacks raise immediate questions about ceasefire implementation and stability in the region.
content: Lebanese state news agency NNA said Israeli warplanes and drones carried out a series of strikes across the Nabatieh area overnight and into Saturday morning.

zh.title: 以色列在停火后数小时内在黎巴嫩造成10人死亡
zh.summary: 以色列军事打击在周六上午前夜至清晨期间在黎巴嫩纳巴蒂耶地区造成至少10人死亡，发生在停火宣布后不久。这些攻击引起了对停火实施和该地区稳定性的直接质疑。

title: Money Box
summary: Civil service pensioners are experiencing further delays in receiving their pension payments, extending ongoing issues with the payment system. The delays continue to affect retirees dependent on these income sources.
content: Civil service pensioners face further delays to payments.

zh.title: 金钱箱
zh.summary: 公务员养老金领取者在领取养老金时遭遇进一步延误，延续了支付系统的持续问题。延误继续影响依赖这些收入来源的退休人员。

title: Goldman Sachs is betting that a recent merger will drive sharp gains for this travel stock
summary: Goldman Sachs upgraded an airline stock to buy from neutral this week, indicating confidence that a recent merger will deliver significant gains. The bank's upgraded outlook suggests optimism about the airline's post-merger performance.
content: The bank this week upgraded the airline to buy from neutral.

zh.title: 高盛押注最近的并购将带动这只旅游股票大幅上涨
zh.summary: 高盛本周将一只航空股从中立升级为买入，表明对最近并购将实现重大收益的信心。该银行升级后的前景表明对该航空公司并购后表现的乐观看法。

title: Five top tech stocks with major upside, Bank of America says
summary: Bank of America has identified five top technology stocks expected to deliver substantial upside as the second half of the year begins. The bank's analysis provides guidance for investors heading into a critical period for tech valuations.
content: Bank of America reveals its top tech stocks heading into the second half.

zh.title: 美国银行称五只顶级科技股具有重大上升空间
zh.summary: 美国银行已确定五只顶级科技股，预计在下半年开始时将带来实质性的上升机会。该银行的分析为投资者在科技估值的关键时期提供了指导。

title: Iran to lodge FIFA complaint over World Cup travel restrictions
summary: Iran's national team is lodging a complaint with FIFA over travel restrictions that force them to commute from Mexico to the United States for group matches due to visa uncertainties and regional conflict. The team's travel burden highlights ongoing geopolitical tensions affecting international sports.
content: The Iran team are commuting from their tournament base in co-host Mexico for their group games in the U.S. due to visa uncertainties and the war.

zh.title: 伊朗就世界杯旅行限制向国际足联提出投诉
zh.summary: 伊朗国家队因签证不确定性和地区冲突，对迫使他们在墨西哥和美国之间往返参加小组赛的旅行限制向国际足联提出投诉。该队的旅行负担突显了影响国际体育的持续地缘政治紧张局势。

title: Massive bonuses for South Korea's chip workers puts central bank on inflation alert
summary: South Korean chip industry workers are receiving substantial bonuses worth millions of won, triggering inflation concerns at the Bank of Korea. The central bank has warned that these large payouts could exert upward pressure on inflation across the economy.
content: Workers from tech industries receive bonus worth millions of won, prompting the Bank of Korea to warn of the upward pressure to inflation.

zh.title: 韩国芯片工人巨额奖金引发央行通胀警报
zh.summary: 韩国芯片产业工人正获得价值数百万韩元的巨额奖金，引发韩国央行的通胀担忧。央行警告称，这些大额支出可能对整个经济的通胀构成上升压力。

title: My mother was co-owner of my late grandmother’s bank account. Should she share the money with her siblings?
summary: A mother who co-owns her late mother's bank account faces questions about whether she must share the funds with her siblings, as the will specifies the estate should be divided equally among all children. The situation highlights the legal complexity between co-ownership rights and inheritance obligations.
content: “The will stated that the estate was to be divided equally among her children.”

zh.title: 我的母亲是已故祖母银行账户的共同所有人。她应该与兄弟姐妹分享这笔钱吗?
zh.summary: 一位母亲作为已故母亲银行账户的共同所有人,面临着是否必须与兄弟姐妹分享资金的问题,因为遗嘱规定遗产应该在所有孩子之间平等分配。这种情况突显了共同所有权和继承义务之间的法律复杂性。
